data.description: DeDup finds and removes duplicate photos, videos and files — entirely on your device. Your data never leaves your phone.
data.html:
<html lang="en"><head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>DeDup — Clean Your Phone, Keep Your Memories</title>
  <meta name="description" content="DeDup finds and removes duplicate photos, videos and files — entirely on your device. Your data never leaves your phone.">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg:        #080B14;
      --surface:   #111827;
      --border:    rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
      --indigo:    #6366F1;
      --violet:    #A78BFA;
      --teal:      #38BDF8;
      --white:     #F8FAFF;
      --muted:     rgba(248,250,255,0.55);
      --radius:    16px;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--white);
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    /* ── CANVAS BACKGROUND ───────────────────────────── */
    #bg-canvas {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* ── LAYOUT ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    .page {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      max-width: 1100px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 24px;
    }

    /* ── NAV ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    nav {
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      padding: 20px 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    nav::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(8,11,20,0.85) 60%, transparent);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      z-index: -1;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .logo {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--white) 0%, var(--violet) 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .logo span {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--indigo) 0%, var(--teal) 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .nav-badge {
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      color: var(--muted);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 4px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }

    /* ── HERO ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .hero {
      min-height: 88vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 80px 0 60px;
      gap: 28px;
    }

    .hero-eyebrow {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: 1.2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--violet);
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: fadeUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.2s forwards;
    }

    .hero-eyebrow::before {
      content: '';
      width: 24px;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--violet);
    }
    .hero-eyebrow::after {
      content: '';
      width: 24px;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--violet);
    }

    .hero-title {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(42px, 7vw, 86px);
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.05;
      letter-spacing: -2px;
      max-width: 820px;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(24px);
      animation: fadeUp 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.35s forwards;
    }

    .hero-title .accent {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--indigo) 0%, var(--violet) 50%, var(--teal) 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .hero-sub {
      font-size: clamp(16px, 2vw, 19px);
      color: var(--muted);
      max-width: 520px;
      line-height: 1.65;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: fadeUp 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.5s forwards;
    }

    /* ── CTA BUTTONS ────────────────────────────────── */
    .cta-group {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: center;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
      animation: fadeUp 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.65s forwards;
    }

    .btn-primary {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--indigo), var(--violet));
      color: #fff;
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 14px 28px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), box-shadow 0.22s ease, filter 0.22s ease;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(99,102,241,0);
      will-change: transform;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .btn-primary::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.15), rgba(255,255,255,0));
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.2s;
    }

    .btn-primary:hover {
      transform: scale3d(1.05, 1.05, 1);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(99,102,241,0.45);
      filter: brightness(1.1);
    }

    .btn-primary:hover::after { opacity: 1; }

    .btn-secondary {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      padding: 13px 22px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      cursor: default;
      letter-spacing: 0.2px;
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }

    /* playstore icon inline */
    .ps-icon {
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* ── TRUST LINE ─────────────────────────────────── */
    .trust {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeUp 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.8s forwards;
    }

    .trust svg { color: #4ADE80; }

    /* ── FEATURES ───────────────────────────────────── */
    .features {
      padding: 80px 0 40px;
    }

    .section-label {
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--violet);
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .section-title {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -1px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      line-height: 1.15;
    }

    .section-sub {
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 16px;
      max-width: 520px;
      margin: 0 auto 60px;
      line-height: 1.65;
    }

    /* ── FEATURE CLUSTERS ───────────────────────────── */
    .feature-cluster {
      margin-bottom: 72px;
    }

    .cluster-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .cluster-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 7px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 5px 12px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid;
    }

    .cluster-badge.media   { color: #A78BFA; border-color: rgba(167,139,250,0.3); background: rgba(167,139,250,0.07); }
    .cluster-badge.smart   { color: #38BDF8; border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.3);  background: rgba(56,189,248,0.07);  }
    .cluster-badge.contacts{ color: #4ADE80; border-color: rgba(74,222,128,0.3);  background: rgba(74,222,128,0.07);  }
    .cluster-badge.ai      { color: #F59E0B; border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.3);  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.07);  }

    .cluster-line {
      flex: 1;
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--border);
    }

    .features-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .features-grid-2 {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
      gap: 16px;
    }

    .feature-card {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 28px 24px;
      transition: transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), border-color 0.25s, background 0.25s;
      will-change: transform;
    }

    .feature-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-5px) scale3d(1.01, 1.01, 1);
      border-color: rgba(99,102,241,0.3);
      background: rgba(99,102,241,0.05);
    }

    .feature-card.card-smart:hover  { border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.3);  background: rgba(56,189,248,0.05);  }
    .feature-card.card-contacts:hover { border-color: rgba(74,222,128,0.3); background: rgba(74,222,128,0.05); }
    .feature-card.card-ai:hover     { border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.3);  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.05);  }

    .feature-icon {
      width: 42px;
      height: 42px;
      border-radius: 11px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      font-size: 20px;
      border: 1px solid;
    }

    .feature-icon.ic-media    { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.1); border-color: rgba(167,139,250,0.2); }
    .feature-icon.ic-smart    { background: rgba(56,189,248,0.1);  border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.2);  }
    .feature-icon.ic-contacts { background: rgba(74,222,128,0.1);  border-color: rgba(74,222,128,0.2);  }
    .feature-icon.ic-ai       { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1);  border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.2);  }

    .feature-title {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: 17px;
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      letter-spacing: -0.3px;
    }

    .feature-desc {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.65;
    }

    /* tag pills inside cards */
    .feature-tags {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 6px;
      margin-top: 14px;
    }

    .ftag {
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 500;
      padding: 3px 9px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ── AI HERO CARD ───────────────────────────────── */
    .ai-hero-card {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,158,11,0.08) 0%, rgba(99,102,241,0.08) 100%);
      border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.2);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 40px 36px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 32px;
      align-items: center;
      transition: border-color 0.25s;
    }

    .ai-hero-card:hover { border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.35); }

    .ai-hero-card .ai-tag {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #F59E0B;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .ai-hero-card h3 {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 30px);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      line-height: 1.2;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .ai-hero-card p {
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.7;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }

    .ai-examples {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .ai-example {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: rgba(248,250,255,0.65);
      line-height: 1.5;
      position: relative;
      padding-left: 28px;
    }

    .ai-example::before {
      content: '"';
      position: absolute;
      left: 12px;
      top: 10px;
      font-size: 18px;
      color: rgba(245,158,11,0.5);
      font-family: Georgia, serif;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .ai-visual {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .ai-bubble {
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      max-width: 90%;
    }

    .ai-bubble.user {
      background: rgba(99,102,241,0.15);
      border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
      color: rgba(248,250,255,0.8);
      align-self: flex-end;
      border-bottom-right-radius: 4px;
    }

    .ai-bubble.bot {
      background: rgba(245,158,11,0.08);
      border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.15);
      color: rgba(248,250,255,0.75);
      align-self: flex-start;
      border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
    }

    .ai-bubble.bot strong { color: #F59E0B; }

    @media (max-width: 700px) {
      .ai-hero-card { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .ai-visual { display: none; }
    }

    /* ── BOTTOM CTA ─────────────────────────────────── */
    .bottom-cta {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 60px 0 100px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    }

    .bottom-cta h2 {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(26px, 4vw, 42px);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -1px;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .bottom-cta p {
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-bottom: 36px;
      font-size: 16px;
    }

    /* ── FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 28px 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 12px;
    }

    footer .logo-sm {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 600;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--white), var(--violet));
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    footer p {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    footer a {
      color: var(--muted);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 12px;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    footer a:hover { color: var(--white); }

    /* ── ANIMATIONS ─────────────────────────────────── */
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    /* scroll reveal utility */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(32px);
      transition: opacity 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
    }
    .reveal.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
    .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
    .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
    .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *, *::before, *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      .hero { min-height: 80vh; padding-top: 60px; }
      .cta-group { flex-direction: column; width: 100%; }
      .btn-primary, .btn-secondary { width: 100%; justify-content: center; }
      footer { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
    }

    /* ── PRIVACY MODAL ──────────────────────────────── */
    .modal-backdrop {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 500;
      background: rgba(8,11,20,0.82);
      backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 20px;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition: opacity 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
    }

    .modal-backdrop.open {
      opacity: 1;
      pointer-events: all;
    }

    .modal {
      background: #0f1422;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
      border-radius: 20px;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 720px;
      max-height: 85vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      transform: translateY(28px) scale3d(0.97,0.97,1);
      transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.08);
    }

    .modal-backdrop.open .modal {
      transform: translateY(0) scale3d(1,1,1);
    }

    .modal-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 22px 28px 18px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .modal-header h2 {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -0.3px;
    }

    .modal-header .date-tag {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--muted);
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 3px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
    }

    .modal-close {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--muted);
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      transition: background 0.18s, color 0.18s;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-left: 12px;
    }
    .modal-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: var(--white); }

    .modal-body {
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 28px;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
      scrollbar-color: rgba(99,102,241,0.3) transparent;
    }

    .modal-body::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    .modal-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.3); border-radius: 99px; }

    .pp-section {
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }

    .pp-section:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

    .pp-section h3 {
      font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--violet);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .pp-section p, .pp-section li {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: rgba(248,250,255,0.7);
      line-height: 1.75;
    }

    .pp-section ul, .pp-section ol {
      padding-left: 18px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }

    .pp-section strong { color: var(--white); font-weight: 500; }

    .pp-highlight {
      background: rgba(56,189,248,0.07);
      border: 1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.18);
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 14px 18px;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: rgba(248,250,255,0.75);
      line-height: 1.65;
      margin-top: 12px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .pp-highlight .shield {
      font-size: 16px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-top: 1px;
    }

    .pp-contact {
      background: rgba(99,102,241,0.07);
      border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.18);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 18px 20px;
    }

    .pp-contact p { margin-top: 6px; }
    .pp-contact a { color: var(--violet); text-decoration: none; }
    .pp-contact a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- Animated mesh background -->
  <canvas id="bg-canvas" width="1280" height="1280" style="width: 1280px; height: 1280px;"></canvas>

  <div class="page">
    <!-- NAV -->
    <nav>
      <div class="logo">De<span>Dup</span></div>
      <div class="nav-badge">dedup.space</div>
    </nav>

    <!-- HERO -->
    <section class="hero">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">On-Device · Private · Free</div>

      <h1 class="hero-title">
        Clean your phone.<br>
        <span class="accent">Keep what matters.</span>
      </h1>

      <p class="hero-sub">
        DeDup finds every duplicate photo, video, and file on your Android — instantly, entirely on-device. Your data never leaves your phone.
      </p>

      <div class="cta-group">
        <a href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rp.dedup" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn-primary">
          <!-- Google Play icon -->
          <svg class="ps-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path d="M3.18 23.76c.37.2.8.22 1.19.06l12.19-7.04-2.68-2.68L3.18 23.76z"></path>
            <path d="M22.14 10.4c-.54-.31-1.24-.31-1.78 0l-2.64 1.52-2.95-2.95 2.95-2.95 2.64 1.52c.54.31 1.24.31 1.78 0 .54-.31.86-.88.86-1.5s-.32-1.19-.86-1.5L4.37.24C3.98.08 3.55.1 3.18.3L13.88 11 3.18 21.7c.37.2.8.22 1.19.06L20.36 12.9l1.78-1.02c.54-.31.86-.88.86-1.5s-.32-1.18-.86-1.5v.52z" opacity=".6"></path>
            <path d="M3.18.3C2.64.61 2.32 1.18 2.32 1.8v20.4c0 .62.32 1.19.86 1.5l10.7-10.7L3.18.3z"></path>
          </svg>
          Get it on Google Play
        </a>
        <div class="btn-secondary">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 20.94c1.5 0 2.75-.56 3.7-1.46m-7.4 1.46C5.57 20.5 4 17.5 4 12c0-4.42 3.58-8 8-8 4.42 0 8 3.58 8 8 0 5.5-1.57 8.5-4.3 8.94"></path><path d="M12 4v8l3 3"></path></svg>
          App Store — Coming Soon
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="trust">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2L3 7v5c0 5.25 3.75 10.15 9 11.25C17.25 22.15 21 17.25 21 12V7l-9-5z"></path></svg>
        Zero cloud uploads. Everything stays on your device.
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- FEATURES -->
    <section class="features">
      <div class="section-label reveal">What DeDup Does</div>
      <h2 class="section-title reveal reveal-delay-1">Every kind of clutter.<br>One app to clear it all.</h2>
      <p class="section-sub reveal reveal-delay-2">DeDup goes beyond basic duplicate finders — it understands your media, your contacts, your chats, and your storage.</p>

      <!-- MEDIA DEDUP -->
      <div class="feature-cluster reveal">
        <div class="cluster-header">
          <div class="cluster-badge media">📸 Media</div>
          <div class="cluster-line"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="features-grid">
          <div class="feature-card">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-media">🖼️</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Photo Deduplication</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Finds exact copies and near-identical shots — burst photos, multiple saves, edited vs. original. Compares pixel-level fingerprints entirely on-device.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">Exact match</span>
              <span class="ftag">Near-duplicate</span>
              <span class="ftag">Burst shots</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-card">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-media">🎬</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Video Deduplication</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Detects duplicate video files including re-downloads, different quality saves, and trimmed variants. Side-by-side preview before you delete.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">Re-downloads</span>
              <span class="ftag">Multi-quality</span>
              <span class="ftag">Preview first</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-card">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-media">🎵</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Audio & Docs</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Scans your music library, voice notes, PDFs, and documents for exact-duplicate files wasting space across folders.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">Music library</span>
              <span class="ftag">PDFs</span>
              <span class="ftag">Voice notes</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SMART CLEANING -->
      <div class="feature-cluster reveal">
        <div class="cluster-header">
          <div class="cluster-badge smart">🧹 Smart Clean</div>
          <div class="cluster-line"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="features-grid">
          <div class="feature-card card-smart">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-smart">💬</div>
            <div class="feature-title">WhatsApp Cleaner</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Automatically surfaces forwarded memes, viral screenshots, and sticker packs clogging your WhatsApp Media folder. One-tap bulk delete.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">Forwarded memes</span>
              <span class="ftag">Sticker packs</span>
              <span class="ftag">Group media</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-card card-smart">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-smart">🧾</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Screenshots & Receipts</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Detects screenshots you no longer need — OTP screens, delivery receipts, payment confirmations, and app notifications saved by accident.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">OTP screens</span>
              <span class="ftag">Receipts</span>
              <span class="ftag">Notifications</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-card card-smart">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-smart">📥</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Downloads Junk</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Finds re-downloaded files, duplicate APKs, and forgotten install packages sitting in your Downloads folder eating up gigabytes.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">Duplicate APKs</span>
              <span class="ftag">Re-downloads</span>
              <span class="ftag">Install leftovers</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- CONTACTS DEDUP -->
      <div class="feature-cluster reveal">
        <div class="cluster-header">
          <div class="cluster-badge contacts">👤 Contacts</div>
          <div class="cluster-line"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="features-grid-2">
          <div class="feature-card card-contacts">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-contacts">🔗</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Duplicate Contact Merger</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Finds contacts saved multiple times — same person across WhatsApp, Google, and SIM. Merges them cleanly, keeping all numbers and emails, removing none.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">Cross-account merge</span>
              <span class="ftag">WhatsApp contacts</span>
              <span class="ftag">Safe — preview first</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="feature-card card-contacts">
            <div class="feature-icon ic-contacts">🗑️</div>
            <div class="feature-title">Blank & Junk Contacts</div>
            <p class="feature-desc">Surfaces contacts with no name, no number, or only a partial entry — the noise that builds up from years of syncing across phones and SIMs.</p>
            <div class="feature-tags">
              <span class="ftag">No-number entries</span>
              <span class="ftag">Partial contacts</span>
              <span class="ftag">SIM leftovers</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- TALK TO STORAGE — AI FEATURE -->
      <div class="feature-cluster reveal">
        <div class="cluster-header">
          <div class="cluster-badge ai">✦ AI Feature</div>
          <div class="cluster-line"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-hero-card">
          <div class="ai-content">
            <div class="ai-tag">
              <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"></path></svg>
              On-Device AI
            </div>
            <h3>Talk to My Storage</h3>
            <p>Ask your phone questions about its own storage — in plain language. No dashboards to navigate, no folders to dig through. Just ask.</p>
            <div class="ai-examples">
              <div class="ai-example">How much space are my WhatsApp files taking?</div>
              <div class="ai-example">Show me all screenshots from last month</div>
              <div class="ai-example">Find videos larger than 100MB I haven't opened</div>
              <div class="ai-example">Which app has the most duplicate downloads?</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="ai-visual">
            <div class="ai-bubble user">Find all duplicate photos from my camera</div>
            <div class="ai-bubble bot">Found <strong>847 duplicate photos</strong> — 2.3 GB that can be freed. 312 are burst shots, 280 are WhatsApp forwards saved twice. Want to review them?</div>
            <div class="ai-bubble user">Delete the WhatsApp ones automatically</div>
            <div class="ai-bubble bot"><strong>280 files removed.</strong> Freed 680 MB. Your originals are untouched. 🛡️</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </section>

    <!-- BOTTOM CTA -->
    <section class="bottom-cta reveal">
      <h2>Your phone. Cleaner. Faster.</h2>
      <p>Photos, videos, contacts, WhatsApp clutter — all cleared. Free, private, on-device.</p>
      <a href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.rp.dedup" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-flex;">
        <svg class="ps-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <path d="M3.18 23.76c.37.2.8.22 1.19.06l12.19-7.04-2.68-2.68L3.18 23.76z"></path>
          <path d="M22.14 10.4c-.54-.31-1.24-.31-1.78 0l-2.64 1.52-2.95-2.95 2.95-2.95 2.64 1.52c.54.31 1.24.31 1.78 0 .54-.31.86-.88.86-1.5s-.32-1.19-.86-1.5L4.37.24C3.98.08 3.55.1 3.18.3L13.88 11 3.18 21.7c.37.2.8.22 1.19.06L20.36 12.9l1.78-1.02c.54-.31.86-.88.86-1.5s-.32-1.18-.86-1.5v.52z" opacity=".6"></path>
          <path d="M3.18.3C2.64.61 2.32 1.18 2.32 1.8v20.4c0 .62.32 1.19.86 1.5l10.7-10.7L3.18.3z"></path>
        </svg>
        Download Free on Android
      </a>
    </section>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <footer>
      <div class="logo-sm">DeDup</div>
      <p>© 2025 Mobile1x · <a href="mailto:therahulpahuja@gmail.com">therahulpahuja@gmail.com</a></p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:16px;">
        <a href="#" id="privacy-link">Privacy</a>
        <a href="#">Terms</a>
      </div>
    </footer>
  </div>

  <!-- PRIVACY POLICY MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-backdrop" id="privacy-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Privacy Policy">
    <div class="modal">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
          <h2>Privacy Policy</h2>
          <span class="date-tag">Updated May 2026</span>
        </div>
        <button class="modal-close" id="modal-close" aria-label="Close">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
            <path d="M1 1l12 12M13 1L1 13"></path>
          </svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">

        <div class="pp-section">
          <p>Rahul Pahuja ("we," "us," or "our") operates the <strong>DeDup</strong> mobile application. Your privacy is fundamental to how we built this app.</p>
          <div class="pp-highlight">
            <span class="shield">🛡️</span>
            <span><strong>Local Processing Guarantee:</strong> All file scanning, hashing, and duplicate detection happen entirely on your device. No file names, contents, or metadata from your storage are ever transmitted to our servers or any third parties.</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>1. Information We Collect</h3>
          <ul>
            <li><strong>Account Data:</strong> If you log in via Google or Facebook, we collect your name, email, and profile picture to personalize your experience.</li>
            <li><strong>Device Information:</strong> Device model, OS version, and unique identifiers via Firebase Analytics to improve app performance.</li>
            <li><strong>Crash Reports:</strong> Firebase Crashlytics collects logs when the app crashes to help us fix bugs.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>2. Permissions & Data Usage</h3>
          <ul>
            <li>
              <strong>All Files Access (MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE):</strong> Allows scanning your entire storage to identify duplicate documents, zip files, and other files consuming space. File hashes are computed locally only — we do not read the content of your personal documents for any purpose other than deduplication.
            </li>
            <li>
              <strong>Media Permissions (Images, Video, Audio):</strong> Allows scanning your gallery and music library for duplicate photos, videos, and songs. Used to generate thumbnails for preview and perform comparisons to find exact duplicates.
            </li>
            <li>
              <strong>Notifications:</strong> To alert you when storage is running low or a scan is complete. No marketing notifications are sent without your explicit consent.
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>3. Third-Party Services</h3>
          <p>We use the following third-party services that may collect data independently:</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Google Play Services / Firebase (Analytics, Crashlytics, Auth)</li>
            <li>Facebook Login SDK</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>4. Facebook Data Deletion</h3>
          <p>To delete data obtained via Facebook Login:</p>
          <ol>
            <li>Remove the app from your Facebook Settings under Apps and Websites.</li>
            <li>Contact us at the email below to request manual deletion of your account data.</li>
          </ol>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>5. Your Rights (GDPR & DPDP)</h3>
          <p>Depending on your location (EU under GDPR or India under DPDP Act), you have the right to:</p>
          <ul>
            <li><strong>Access</strong> a copy of your personal data</li>
            <li><strong>Rectification</strong> of inaccurate or incomplete data</li>
            <li><strong>Erasure</strong> ("Right to be Forgotten")</li>
            <li><strong>Data Portability</strong> in a structured, machine-readable format</li>
            <li><strong>Withdraw Consent</strong> for analytics at any time via app settings</li>
            <li><strong>Nominate</strong> an individual to exercise your rights (DPDP specific)</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>6. Legal Basis for Processing</h3>
          <ul>
            <li><strong>Performance of a Contract:</strong> To provide the core cleaning features you requested.</li>
            <li><strong>Legitimate Interests:</strong> To improve app performance via crash reports and analytics.</li>
            <li><strong>Consent:</strong> When you voluntarily log in via social media or opt-in to certain features.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>7. Security</h3>
          <p>We use industry-standard encryption (SQLCipher) to protect your local scan history and settings stored on your device.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>8. Disclaimer & Limitation of Liability</h3>
          <p>The DeDup application is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We make no warranties regarding the accuracy of duplicate detection. To the full extent permissible by law, we disclaim all implied warranties. Rahul Pahuja shall not be liable for any damages arising from use of the app, including any loss of data resulting from use of the file deletion features.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="pp-section">
          <h3>9. Contact & Grievance Redressal</h3>
          <div class="pp-contact">
            <p><strong>Data Protection / Grievance Officer</strong></p>
            <p><strong>Name:</strong> Rahul Pahuja</p>
            <p><strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:therahulpahuja@gmail.com">therahulpahuja@gmail.com</a></p>
            <p><strong>Website:</strong> <a href="https://www.therahulpahuja.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">www.therahulpahuja.com</a></p>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async="" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-E6B5M8JKHP"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-E6B5M8JKHP');
</script>
  <script>
    /* ── GEMINI-STYLE MESH BACKGROUND ─────────────────
       Two soft orbs that breathe, rotate, and create
       an iridescent mesh — GPU composited via canvas.
       Inspired by Gemini's animated gradient bg.
    ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    (function () {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('bg-canvas');
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

      let W, H, dpr;
      const orbs = [
        { x: 0.25, y: 0.25, r: 0.55, hue: 245, phase: 0,    speed: 0.0004, drift: { x: 0.07, y: 0.05 } },
        { x: 0.78, y: 0.65, r: 0.50, hue: 275, phase: 2.1,  speed: 0.0003, drift: { x:-0.06, y: 0.08 } },
        { x: 0.55, y: 1.0,  r: 0.40, hue: 195, phase: 4.2,  speed: 0.0005, drift: { x: 0.04, y:-0.05 } },
      ];

      function resize() {
        dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
        W = window.innerWidth;
        H = window.innerHeight;
        canvas.width  = W * dpr;
        canvas.height = H * dpr;
        canvas.style.width  = W + 'px';
        canvas.style.height = H + 'px';
        ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
      }

      function easeInOutSine(t) {
        return -(Math.cos(Math.PI * t) - 1) / 2;
      }

      let lastTime = 0;
      function draw(now) {
        const dt = now - lastTime;
        lastTime = now;

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

        for (const orb of orbs) {
          orb.phase += orb.speed * Math.min(dt, 50);

          // slow sinusoidal drift — no layout jank, pure canvas
          const ox = orb.x * W + Math.sin(orb.phase * 1.3) * orb.drift.x * W;
          const oy = orb.y * H + Math.cos(orb.phase * 0.9) * orb.drift.y * H;

          // breathing: radius pulses ±8%
          const breathe  = 1 + 0.08 * Math.sin(orb.phase * 2);
          const radius   = orb.r * Math.max(W, H) * breathe;

          // hue slowly rotates
          const hue = orb.hue + orb.phase * 18;

          const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(ox, oy, 0, ox, oy, radius);
          grad.addColorStop(0,   `hsla(${hue}, 80%, 65%, 0.22)`);
          grad.addColorStop(0.4, `hsla(${hue + 30}, 75%, 55%, 0.10)`);
          grad.addColorStop(1,   `hsla(${hue + 60}, 70%, 45%, 0)`);

          ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';
          ctx.fillStyle = grad;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(ox, oy, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fill();
        }

        // very subtle noise grain overlay for depth (every frame, light)
        // draw a faint vignette instead to keep it clean
        const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2, H/2, H*0.1, W/2, H/2, H*1.0);
        vignette.addColorStop(0,   'rgba(8,11,20,0)');
        vignette.addColorStop(1,   'rgba(8,11,20,0.55)');
        ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
        ctx.fillStyle = vignette;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
      }

      window.addEventListener('resize', resize, { passive: true });
      resize();
      requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    })();


    /* ── SCROLL REVEAL ──────────────────────────────── */
    (function () {
      const els = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
      const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
        entries.forEach(e => {
          if (e.isIntersecting) {
            e.target.classList.add('visible');
            io.unobserve(e.target);
          }
        });
      }, { threshold: 0.12 });
      els.forEach(el => io.observe(el));
    })();
    /* ── PRIVACY MODAL ──────────────────────────────── */
    (function () {
      const backdrop = document.getElementById('privacy-modal');
      const openBtn  = document.getElementById('privacy-link');
      const closeBtn = document.getElementById('modal-close');

      function open(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        backdrop.classList.add('open');
        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      }

      function close() {
        backdrop.classList.remove('open');
        document.body.style.overflow = '';
      }

      openBtn.addEventListener('click', open);
      closeBtn.addEventListener('click', close);

      // close on backdrop click
      backdrop.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (e.target === backdrop) close();
      });

      // close on Escape key
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape' && backdrop.classList.contains('open')) close();
      });
    })();
  </script>


</body></html>

metadata.description: DeDup finds and removes duplicate photos, videos and files — entirely on your device. Your data never leaves your phone.

data.title: DeDup — Clean Your Phone, Keep Your Memories
